name: Ready-mix concrete; 3000 psi Bridge Building Systems to Construction Materials
description: This process links an input in a Building Systems process to a provider from the NIST Construction Materials repository on the Federal LCA Commons. The intended provider for this process is "Ready-mix concrete production, 3000 Psi - US"
category: Bridge processes/Building Systems to Construction Materials
